input.args: Build a Minimalist Task-Timer webapp using Next.js. The app should allow users to input a task name and a duration (in minutes), then run a visual countdown timer. A key requirement is a visual overlay where the agent's insect emoji (🦗) 'drizzles' or falls down the page as a background animation.

Build a Minimalist Task-Timer webapp using Next.js. The app should allow users to input a task name and a duration (in minutes), then run a visual countdown timer. A key requirement is a visual overlay where the agent's insect emoji (🦗) 'drizzles' or falls down the page as a background animation.
